content:
✨ telegram-mcp | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To act as a bridge between AI models/clients and the Telegram messaging platform, enabling AI to read, understand, and interact with Telegram chats and groups programmatically.
✨ Key Features: • Full-featured Telegram integration for MCP-compatible clients (Claude, Cursor, etc.) • Powered by Telethon and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) • Programmatic interaction with Telegram accounts
📖 Summary: Telegram MCP Server is a Python-based server that leverages the Telethon library to provide a comprehensive interface for interacting with Telegram. It allows MCP-compatible clients, such as AI assistants, to read chats, manage groups, send and modify messages, media, contacts, and settings.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
